hooks.description: Stop hook (opt-in): after a code-producing turn, spawn an INDEPENDENT reviewer agent (code-review-deep on Sonnet) over the working-tree diff and BLOCK until CRITICAL/HIGH findings are addressed and verified. OFF by default; enable with `touch ~/.config/cue/auto-review-enabled`. Recursion-guarded, round-capped (2), fail-open. Suppress one turn with [skip-auto-review].
